title: Electrical Services | Boise & Treasure Valley | Bam Electric
description: Bam Electric provides massive-ROI commercial electrical services and zero-excuse residential upgrades across the Treasure Valley. Master License #030135.

data.desc: Whether you are a facility manager battling downtime or a homeowner tired of tripping breakers, our code-compliant Master Electricians execute flawlessly. Fast turnaround. Zero excuses.

data.title: Aggressive, High-Performance Solutions
data.subtitle: Select your sector below for immediate dispatch details.

services.title: Residential Upgrades & Panels
services.description: Stop tripping breakers. We upgrade old Boise homes to modern 200-amp panels seamlessly and safely.

services.title: Commercial & Industrial Infrastructure
services.description: Prevent costly downtime. We design, install, and maintain heavy-duty commercial electrical systems.

services.title: Agricultural Wiring & Pumps
services.description: Keep the water flowing and the equipment running with rugged agricultural power solutions.

services.title: EV Chargers & Hot Tubs
services.description: Future-proof your home with high-voltage dedicated circuits for EVs, spas, and heavy shop equipment.

services.title: Lighting & Efficiency Design
services.description: Lower your overhead with custom LED retrofits and smart lighting controls for modern spaces.

services.title: Rapid Troubleshooting
services.description: Dead outlets? Arcing wires? Our diagnostic process pinpoints the exact failure point fast.
